note: MULTI-CHILD (teenager + newborn). A clinic reminder for a WELL-BABY / 2-month visit names no child, but only one child is an infant — attribute to the newborn by an unambiguous age/stage cue. A reminder is a one-way notice → surface_only.

input.rawContent:
From: reminders@littlesprout-pediatrics.ca
Subject: Upcoming well-baby visit

This is a reminder of an upcoming 2-month well-baby visit on Thursday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Okafor. The visit includes the 2-month immunizations. Reply STOP to opt out.
